title: netbox/ipam-resolve output (Workflow-facing)
description: The Workflow-step-facing output Contract for the netbox/ipam-resolve Action (ADR-0113 D4). INTENTIONALLY IDENTICAL in shape to the class contract capabilities/ipam.output (ADR-0111) — bound by a co-fidelity test. `vlanId` (an integer) is what a downstream vcenter/create-portgroup Step binds via {{.steps.<name>.outputs.vlanId}} (native type preserved).

cidr.description: The allocated prefix in CIDR notation (e.g. 10.30.4.0/24).

vlanId.description: The allocated 802.1Q VLAN id, when a VLAN was requested.

gateway.description: The gateway address for the allocated prefix, when the provider assigns one.

credentialRef.description: A §2.5 CredentialRef NAME (never material) for backend auth, when the handle carries one.
